name: White Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the crushed cookie crumbs and melted butter together. Press the mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
3. In a large bowl, beat the cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla extract until well blended.
4. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
5. Blend in the melted white chocolate.
6. Pour the mixture over the crust.
7. Bake at 325°F for 40 minutes.
8. Turn off the oven and let the cheesecake cool in the oven for 1 hour.
9. Cool completely and refrigerate. Garnish with chocolate leaves if desired.
